name: typescript-snippets
description: A collection of coding problems solved in TypeScript for coding practice and improving problem-solving skills.

scripts.start: sh -c 'f="${1%.ts}"; f="${f#src/}"; tsc "src/$f.ts" --outDir dist --rootDir . --target esnext --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --strict --skipLibCheck && node "dist/src/$f.js"' _
